_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Identify and implement tooling for controlling the steps in a continuous integration (CI) and continuous deployment (CD) pipeline.
reference_document_element_description: Configure and maintain CI/CD pipelines for data and AI projects, including build automation, test execution, artifact management, deployment workflows, and pipeline failure triage.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI TF domain. TF-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-009 (TF, cosine: 0.733), AI-S-016 (AI, cosine: 0.702).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.0/10 (raw 0.701). Shared vocabulary: [cd, ci, deployment, pipeline]. DCWF-only terms [continuous, controlling, identify, implement, integration, steps] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, artifact, automation, build, configure, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.885, R=0.875). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Identify and implement tooling for controlling the steps in a continuous integra" and "Configure and maintain CI/CD pipelines for data and AI projects, including build" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.736 ≈ STS 0.701 (gap 0.036). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [cd, ci, deployment, pipeline] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 18.8%. Shared tokens: [cd, ci, deployment, pipeline]. DCWF-only: [continuous, controlling, identify, implement, integration, steps]. WIDAI-only: [ai, artifact, automation, build, configure, data].
